svg.aria-label: Startup sequence: seed state, spawn UI first with a fatal five-second ready wait, spawn six workers with three-second degrade waits, send startup commands, send the full snapshot, enter the loop
svg.text: 0 · Seed the ledger
contacts, volumes, voice settings, power-safety config
1 · Spawn the UI — first, and fatal
yoyopod-ui-host --hardware whisplay
wait 5 s for ui.ready — timeout aborts the whole runtime
2 · Spawn the departments — tolerant
cloud → media → voip → network → power → speech,
each with a 3 s ready wait; a timeout marks the domain
Degraded and boot continues
speech is spawned only if voice.worker_enabled —
otherwise the domain is marked Disabled
3 · Startup commands
ui.set_backlight · media.configure + media.start
voip.configure + voip.register · network.query_gps
cloud.publish_heartbeat · *.health probes
config is pushed to media/voip; others self-loaded theirs
4 · One full script
the only full RuntimeSnapshot — patches from here on
5 · The loop
run_once every ~20 ms until shutdown or the landlord acts
Shutdown mirrors it: SIGTERM / UI intent → worker.stop to all seven → 1 s grace → kill survivors → markers logged.
